alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a system of three linearly fused benzene rings.
alternative_parents.name: Anthracenes

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds that are analogues to chromene, with the difference that a sulfur atom replaces the oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Thiochromenes

alternative_parents.description: Organic heterocyclic compounds containing an isothiochromene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Isothiochromenes

alternative_parents.description: Organic aromatic compounds that 1-benzothiopyran, a bicyclic compound made up of a benzene ring fused to a thiopyran, so that the sulfur atom is at the 2-position.
alternative_parents.name: 2-benzothiopyrans

alternative_parents.description: Organic aromatic compounds that 1-benzothiopyran, a bicyclic compound made up of a benzene ring fused to a thiopyran, so that the sulfur atom is at the 1-position.
alternative_parents.name: 1-benzothiopyrans

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing an aromatic ring where a carbon atom is linked to an hetero atom.
alternative_parents.name: Heteroaromatic compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Polycyclic compounds containing a phenanthrene moiety, which is a tricyclic aromatic compound with three non-linearly fused benzene.
class.name: Phenanthrenes and derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as phenanthrenes and derivatives. These are polycyclic compounds containing a phenanthrene moiety, which is a tricyclic aromatic compound with three non-linearly fused benzene.

direct_parent.description: Polycyclic compounds containing a phenanthrene moiety, which is a tricyclic aromatic compound with three non-linearly fused benzene.
direct_parent.name: Phenanthrenes and derivatives

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
